videoSnippet.title: PERFECTION || Anish vs Praggnanandhaa || Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Giri, Anish (2664) - Praggnanandhaa R (2690)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.07.03
E06 Catalan, closed, 5.Nf3

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.g3 Be7 5.Bg2 O-O 6.O-O c6 7.Qc2 b6 8.Rd1 Nbd7 9.Bf4 Nh5 10.Bc1 Nhf6 11.b3 Bb7 12.Nc3 Ba6 13.Bb2 dxc4 14.bxc4 Bxc4 15.Nd2 Ba6 16.Bxc6 Rc8 17.Bf3 b5 18.a3 Qb6 19.Qb3 Rb8 20.Nde4 Nxe4 21.Bxe4 Bb7 22.Bxb7 Qxb7 23.d5 Nc5 24.Qa2 a5 25.dxe6 fxe6 26.Rac1 b4 27.axb4 axb4 28.Nb1 b3 29.Qa5 Rf5 30.Qe1 Ne4 31.Bd4 e5 32.Be3 Bg5 33.Qa5 Nxf2 34.Bxf2 Rxf2

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:00 Game Starts!
02:30 Completely New Game (b3)
07:22 Pause the Video
07:55 IWITP 
09:30 Standings after Round 9
10:15 Legends of the Channel
10:40 Lotus Chess is The Way!
